violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food prepared and packaged by a processing plant was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days after original package was opened. Whipping cream found expired in the small fridge behind the register. Expired foods should not be used in licensed facilities.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Testing strips were not available for checking sanitizing solutions. Test strips should be available to make sure proper strength is used for sanitizing equipment.

Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. Restroom door is not self-closing. Restroom doors should be self-closing. Hinges on-site, not yet installed.--Toilet room was not provided with sufficient mechanical ventilation. Ventilation is not provided in restroom. Restrooms should be provided with ventilation.
